modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Difficulty selecting notes and objects in OneNote using shortcuts.

full_description_text:  
User is trying to use OneNote. They want to select notes and objects. But shortcuts are not working. It's confusing and they don't know what to do. They just want to get their notes organized.
short_description: Difficulty selecting notes and objects in OneNote using shortcuts.
description: User is trying to use OneNote. They want to select notes and objects. But shortcuts are not working. It's confusing and they don't know what to do. They just want to get their notes organized.
